General.Name: CTR Holdings Limited
General.Description: CTR Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides structural engineering and wet architectural works in Singapore. The company offers reinforced concrete works, such as steel reinforcement works, formwork erection, and concrete works, as well as precast installation works. It also provides masonry building works; plastering and screeding works; tiling works; and waterproofing works. The company's public sector projects include the building of hospitals and MRT stations for government departments, statutory bodies, and government-controlled entities; and private sector projects comprise the building of residential estates, office buildings, and data centers for property developers, as well as semiconductor factory and mixed development projects. CTR Holdings Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Singapore. CTR Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Brave Ocean Limited.
